raw_source.title: [Remote] Satoshi Protocol is looking for Desinger
raw_source.body:
## About
Satoshi Protocol is the first CDP built on BTC Layer 2, it allows investors to deposit BTC and borrow stablecoin $SAT, Unleash trillion dollars of BTCFi.

## Responsibilities
Responsible for creating social media graphics, product UI/UX design, and banner design, ensuring they align with brand and product styles.
Assist in creating wireframes and designing final interfaces based on requirements.
Coordinate the design direction of operations and unify brand tones.
Oversee the overall visual direction of the product to enhance the brand image.

## Requirements
Proficient in Figma.
Basic understanding of front-end development concepts, able to understand and use components.
Fluent in both Chinese and English for effective communication with overseas teams.
Deadline-oriented with a keen awareness of project timelines.

## Nice to Haves
Demonstrates a unique aesthetic and style.
Familiar with current trends in interactive design standards and specifications, possessing a keen sense of popular trends.
Has a portfolio of impressive work.
Familiarity with Web3 and industry experience.

## Special Notes
No part-timers; please do not apply if you're unwilling to complete a test task.
Test tasks can be treated as freelance cases, with pricing negotiable based on the scope. For design tasks, half of the payment will be made upfront as a deposit.

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Remote

## Salary and Benefits
Compensation is open for discussion.

## Work Location 
Remote

## Contact
https://t.me/yoyoland_a

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

raw_source.author: yoyolandayulei

narrative: ## About Satoshi Protocol is the first CDP built on BTC Layer 2, it allows investors to deposit BTC and borrow stablecoin $SAT, Unleash trillion dollars of BTCFi.

## Responsibilities Responsible for creating social media graphics, product UI/UX design, and banner design, ensuring they align with brand and product styles. Assist in creating wireframes and designing final interfaces based on requirements. Coordinate the design direction of operations and unify brand tones. Oversee the overall visual direction of the product to enhance the brand image.

## Requirements Proficient in Figma. Basic understanding of front-end development concepts, able to understand and use components. Fluent in both Chinese and English for effective communication with overseas teams. Deadline-oriented with a keen awareness of project timelines.

## Nice to Haves Demonstrates a unique aesthetic and style. Familiar with current trends in interactive design standards and specifications, possessing a keen sense of popular trends. Has a portfolio of impressive work. Familiarity with Web3 and industry experience.

## Special Notes No part-timers; please do not apply if you're unwilling to complete a test task. Test tasks can be treated as freelance cases, with pricing negotiable based on the scope. For design tasks, half of the payment will be made upfront as a deposit.
- Full-time or not: Full-time - Remote or not: Remote
## Salary and Benefits Compensation is open for discussion.
